title: Calonemorchis reticulata
taxonomy: Calonemorchis reticulata is a genus and species of orchid. The classification of Calonemorchis reticulata is within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae, one of the largest subfamilies of orchids. The genus Calonemorchis is also part of the tribe Vandeae, a diverse and widespread group of orchids. Further classification may include its placement within a particular tribe or section within the Vandeae.
